purpose: Route OMA and Agent Lab feedback targets to the MAS Scholar Skills professional skill source of truth without externalizing MAS stage prompts or owner authority.

feedback_target_mappings.dedicated_skill_boundary: medical-figure-style and medical-figure-composer are display sub-skill trigger surfaces that emit candidate refs, layout/style QA, and route-back hints; medical-figure-design remains the orchestrator and no MAS authority is added.

capabilities.externalization_reason: Rich app skill is a required standard OPL primary skill source; plugin skill remains a Codex carrier mirror and does not own MAS truth.
MAS stage prompts and owner authority stay in MAS; reusable medical professional skills are single-sourced in MAS Scholar Skills and consumed as refs-only candidates.
capabilities.dedicated_skill_boundary: medical-figure-style emits style reference / style-QA candidate refs; medical-figure-composer emits panel plan / layout-composition candidate refs. Both route through medical-figure-design and cannot write MAS truth, owner receipts, typed blockers, publication readiness, current package, runtime queues, or provider attempts.

MAS stage prompts are domain-agent operating surfaces and stay in the MAS repo.
Tool access remains a MAS/Fabric connector boundary; professional skills may reference tools but do not become tools.
Medical research truth, source readiness, hypothesis portfolio, and publication memory are MAS knowledge refs.
MAS quality gates audit evidence and route repair targets without signing owner receipts or publication readiness.
Agent Lab receives refs-only suite and feedback targets; it does not own MAS domain truth.
